items.description: Supply and install wood bridge with dimension (7050mm*1550mm*1600mm), with hot galvanized steel structure, electro static paint, stainless steel 20mm dia pipe (304), pitch pine wood, wood shield and stain finish, stainless steel anchors and fixing materials (12M stainless bolts, 16M galvanized studs 60cm).

Supply and install wood bridge with dimension (6000mm*1550mm*1600mm), with hot galvanized steel structure, electro static paint, stainless steel 20mm dia pipe (304), pitch pine wood, wood shield and stain finish, stainless steel anchors and fixing materials (12M stainless bolts, 16M galvanized studs 60cm).

Supply and install curved wood bridge with dimension (6850mm*1500mm*1600mm), with hot galvanized steel structure, electro static paint, stainless steel 20mm dia pipe (304), pitch pine wood, wood shield and stain finish, stainless steel anchors and fixing materials (12M stainless bolts, 16M galvanized studs 60cm).

Supply and install curved wood bridge with dimension (4350mm*1500mm*1600mm), with hot galvanized steel structure, electro static paint, stainless steel 20mm dia pipe (304), pitch pine wood, wood shield and stain finish, stainless steel anchors and fixing materials (12M stainless bolts, 16M galvanized studs 60cm).

Supply and install curved wood bridge with dimension (5600mm*1500mm*1600mm), with hot galvanized steel structure, electro static paint, stainless steel 20mm dia pipe (304), pitch pine wood, wood shield and stain finish, stainless steel anchors and fixing materials (12M stainless bolts, 16M galvanized studs 60cm).

documents.notes:
note price dosnt include VAT, note price include supply and installation according to the specs agreed, note price NOT include CIVIL WORKS, price validity 7days, 50% upon contract
[توجيهات الرفع والملحوظات]: تاكد انك واخد الوصف كله حتى اللغه العربى مع الحفاظ على التنسيق وعدم تداخل البنود للصفحه االتاليه
